name: fractional_bucket_by_attribute_override
description: bucket_by={"var":"email"} overrides the default flagKey+targetingKey concatenation. Bucketing key = attribute "email" = "blue_user". murmur3("blue_user") = 3510234506 -> bucket 81/100. Split [on:50, off:50]: 81 >= 50 -> off. Oracle: MurmurHash3 x86-32 seed 0, computed independently.
